top_signals.title: Spot LNG prices likely to be ‘sticky’ amid supply woes, low Europe stocks: JERA Global CEO
top_signals.summary: Spot LNG prices are likely to be “sticky” at a relatively high level amid Middle East supply disruptions and low gas storage in Europe, Yukio Kani, global CEO and chairman of Japan’s largest power generation company, JERA, said June 24. “My view is that prices may be sticky and may not fall very easily,” Kani ...
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: US Vertex to expand Group ||| base oil production
top_signals.summary: US Vertex Energy will expand Group III production capability at its Mobile, Alabama, refinery by 6,000 bbl/day, the company said. The expansion is distinct from Vertex’s existing re-refined Group III production, using a crude-derived hydrocracked vacuum gas oil (VGO) stream from the Mobile refinery to produce conventional Group III. Vertex said it has produced a ...
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: How much compute does the world really need?
top_signals.summary: Scale cannot solve AI’s fundamental problem with accuracy
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: City law firm lands record £36bn BHP case
top_signals.summary: City-based law firm Quinn Emmanuel has been appointed to lead litigation on a £36bn claim against BHP, one of the largest class action claims in UK history. Another London-based law firm, Pogust Goodhead, is leading the claim against the mining giant over a 2015 collapse of a dam in Brazil, and said on Wednesday it [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: German drugmaker Merck to buy Bio-Techne in $11.3bn deal
top_signals.summary: Acquisition of US medical tools maker will be German group’s biggest in over a decade

top_signals.title: Japan clears 18 officials to handle economic security info
top_signals.summary: The personnel were qualified under the security clearance assessment system based on the law, which was enacted in May 2024.
